name: Radium Jawbone+
descriptionTemplate: After releasing "Exalt, " all enemies take 1 instance of {Fixed DMG} equal to [Arg1]% of your team's Max HP and trigger [Arg2]% {Poison}.
lore: Displayed in a private collector's showroom. The collector was captivated by its beautiful fluorescence, admiring it day and night, until he eventually withered away and became one of its kind.
